reference: A five-year-old hit his forehead with another child on the playground. An immediate bump formed on his forehead. I applied ice, which reduced the swelling considerably. He appears to be fine—no nausea, no headache, etc. This happened at seven:zero PM, and he went to bed at nine:zero PM. I keep checking on him, and all seems normal. Is this okay?
